mapper.sql: id, session_id, user_id, user_type, user_input, ai_response, dify_conversation_id, intent, channel, duration, satisfaction, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consultation_logs (session_id, user_id, user_type, user_input, ai_response, dify_conversation_id, intent, channel, duration, satisfaction, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{userType}, #{userInput}, #{aiResponse}, #{difyConversationId}, #{intent}, #{channel}, #{duration}, #{satisfaction}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM consultation_logs WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT FROM consultation_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM consultation_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT FROM consultation_logs WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM consultation_logs WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND dify_conversation_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT satisfaction AS satisfactionLevel, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM consultation_logs WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY satisfaction
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS statDate, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM consultation_logs WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE(create_time)

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS statDate, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, AVG(satisfaction) AS avgScore FROM consultation_logs WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY statDate

SELECT DATE(c.create_time) AS statDate, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(c.user_id, c.session_id)) AS userCount FROM consultation_logs c WHERE c.create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE(c.create_time) ORDER BY statDate

SELECT DATE(c.create_time) AS statDate, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(c.user_id, c.session_id)) AS userCount FROM consultation_logs c WHERE c.create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM historical_orders o WHERE (o.user_id = c.user_id OR (c.session_id IS NOT NULL AND o.user_id IS NOT NULL)) AND o.create_time >= c.create_time ) GROUP BY DATE(c.create_time) ORDER BY statDate

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS statDate, COUNT(*) AS usageCount FROM consultation_logs WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND ai_response IS NOT NULL AND ai_response != '' GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY statDate
